message:
feat(e2e): artifact manager and scenario harness infrastructure

Introduce structured E2E test infrastructure replacing ad-hoc tmux/log
setup with proper artifact management and deterministic scenarios.

New files:
- e2e/harness.go: ArtifactManager with ArtifactKind enum (logs, commands,
  captures, summaries, transport, traces), ArtifactRetention policy,
  layout creation, manifest tracking, and timeline recording.
- e2e/harness_test.go: Tests for artifact manager layout and manifest.
- e2e/scenario_harness.go: ScenarioHarness providing deterministic tmux
  session management with cleanup, artifact directory layout, command
  execution, and cursor/event tracking for operator-loop verification.
- e2e/scenario_harness_test.go: Tests for scenario harness layout,
  session naming, and artifact directory structure.

Modified:
- e2e/suite_test.go: TestSuite now uses ScenarioHarness for session
  management and artifact directories instead of ad-hoc setup.
  Add newTestLoggerWithDir for harness integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
